description: These sandal-themed floaters from lotto with bright coloured straps are for the exuberant in nature. Wear this with casual tees and bermudas or denims. Upper Interconnected ankle straps, midfoot straps and toe separator made of fabric Adjustable ankle straps Cushioned rubber footbed stitched to the outsole with textured grooves Scorpion print for style Outsole TPU rubber outsole with patterned lugs for grip and traction Sandal care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
